YASIR DEV Cyber Security Ethical Hacking Termux Linux HTML CSS JavaScript Web Development Python Git & GitHub Networking Cloud Computing UI / UX Design SEO Productivity Tools Bonus Vault
Mega learning system

YASIR DEV

Ek hi single HTML file me tumhe Roman Urdu courses, commands, lessons, search, PDF export, terminal simulator, aur alag alag themed pages milenge. Har skill ko route ke through alag page ki tarah kholo.

15+Skills
160Lessons each
Roman UrduSimple teaching
TerminalSimulator included

Course behavior

Hash route change hote hi page apna theme aur content load karega. Har route ka visual style alag rakha gaya hai.

Learning style

Roman Urdu me concept, example, task, aur PDF note diya gaya hai taake beginner ko confusion na ho.

Animations

Soft scroll reveal, floating background particles, button glow, modal popup, aur page transitions use kiye gaye hain.

Working promise

Ye file directly browser me open ho sakti hai aur GitHub Pages pe upload bhi ki ja sakti hai.

Navigation

Learning Sections

Yahan se har course ko alag page jaisa open kar sakte ho. Har route ka design alag theme ke sath hai.

Quick Jump

What makes this site strong?

  • Roman Urdu courses
  • Separate route sections
  • Command examples
  • PDF friendly design
  • Animated learning layout
Welcome / YASIR DEV

Shoro yahan se karo aur har skill ko alag page ki tarah kholo.

Ye single-file learning platform beginners aur serious learners dono ke liye bana hai. Har section me command, explanation, aur practice note Roman Urdu me diya gaya hai.

15+Skills / Courses
Roman UrduEasy learning style
160Lessons per skill
PDFPrintable notes

Website ka maksad

Yeh platform tumhe sirf batata nahi, balke course ki tarah sikhata hai. Har topic ko step by step Roman Urdu me samjhaya gaya hai taake beginner bhi comfortable feel kare.

Har section ka style aur animation alag rakhne ki koshish ki gayi hai.

Learning path

Pehle basics, phir command practice, phir projects. Is order se tumhari learning strong banti hai aur confusion kam hoti hai.

BasicsPracticeProjects

PDF vault

Har page par print button diya gaya hai. Tum browser print dialog se asaani se PDF save kar sakte ho.

Save as PDFRevision

UI / UX Design

Hierarchy, spacing, flow, accessibility

SEO

Metadata, indexing, content structure

Productivity Tools

Planning, focus, notes, revision

Welcome popup, page transition, soft reveal, terminal simulator, search filter, aur print/PDF support sab built-in hai.

Route / Cyber Security

Cyber Security

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Threat awareness

Ye lesson threat awareness ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum threat awareness ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

ls -la

Task: Apni notebook me threat awareness ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Cyber SecurityRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Course Lessons

Cyber Security Full Course

001. Threat awareness

Ye lesson threat awareness ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is course me basics se start kar ke advance level tak jao ge. Har lesson me practical idea aur clear explanation diya gaya hai.

Is part me tum threat awareness ka kaam, structure, aur use-case samjhoge. Isko notes me likho aur chhoti practice ke zariye yaad karo.

ls -la

Roman Urdu Tip: threat awareness ko apni practice list me add karo aur ek chhota revision note banao. Yahi note PDF me save kar sakte ho.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur safe environment me practice karo.

PDF Note: Save this card as PDF during revision.

Commands / Tools

Cyber Security command guide

ping

Host ki reachability check karta hai.

Use: Network test ke liye.

ping 8.8.8.8

Basic network check.

traceroute

Network path dikhata hai.

Use: Routing dekhne ke liye.

traceroute example.com

Troubleshooting me useful.

ss -tulpen

Listening ports dikhata hai.

Use: Services dekhne ke liye.

ss -tulpen

Admin level visibility.

systemctl status

Service ka status batata hai.

Use: Linux services inspect karne ke liye.

systemctl status ssh

Server aur desktop dono me helpful.

journalctl -xe

System logs ka detailed view deta hai.

Use: Errors troubleshoot karne ke liye.

journalctl -xe

Deep diagnostics.

chmod 755

File permissions change karta hai.

Use: Execute permission set karne ke liye.

chmod 755 script.sh

Permissions samajhna zaroori hai.

pwd

Current folder ka path batata hai.

Use: Location confirm karne ke liye.

pwd

Har beginner ko pehle ye command samajhni chahiye.

ls

Folder ke andar files aur folders list karta hai.

Use: Content dekhne ke liye.

ls

Basic navigation ka base command.

ls -la

Hidden files aur detailed list dikhata hai.

Use: Full structure inspect karne ke liye.

ls -la

Permissions bhi nazar aati hain.

cd

Directory change karta hai.

Use: Folder ke andar move hone ke liye.

cd Downloads

Path galat likhne se error aata hai.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Cyber Security track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Ethical Hacking

Authorized labs, reporting, defense mindset

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

What you will learn

Route / Ethical Hacking

Ethical Hacking

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Ethics

Ye lesson ethics ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum ethics ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

ls -la

Task: Apni notebook me ethics ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Ethical HackingRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Course Lessons

Ethical Hacking Full Course

001. Ethics

Ye lesson ethics ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is course me basics se start kar ke advance level tak jao ge. Har lesson me practical idea aur clear explanation diya gaya hai.

Is part me tum ethics ka kaam, structure, aur use-case samjhoge. Isko notes me likho aur chhoti practice ke zariye yaad karo.

ls -la

Roman Urdu Tip: ethics ko apni practice list me add karo aur ek chhota revision note banao. Yahi note PDF me save kar sakte ho.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur safe environment me practice karo.

Commands / Tools

Ethical Hacking command guide

ping

Host ki reachability check karta hai.

Use: Network test ke liye.

ping 8.8.8.8

Basic network check.

traceroute

Network path dikhata hai.

Use: Routing dekhne ke liye.

traceroute example.com

Troubleshooting me useful.

ss -tulpen

Listening ports dikhata hai.

Use: Services dekhne ke liye.

ss -tulpen

Admin level visibility.

systemctl status

Service ka status batata hai.

Use: Linux services inspect karne ke liye.

systemctl status ssh

Server aur desktop dono me helpful.

journalctl -xe

System logs ka detailed view deta hai.

Use: Errors troubleshoot karne ke liye.

journalctl -xe

Deep diagnostics.

chmod 755

File permissions change karta hai.

Use: Execute permission set karne ke liye.

chmod 755 script.sh

Permissions samajhna zaroori hai.

pwd

Current folder ka path batata hai.

Use: Location confirm karne ke liye.

pwd

Har beginner ko pehle ye command samajhni chahiye.

ls

Folder ke andar files aur folders list karta hai.

Use: Content dekhne ke liye.

ls

Basic navigation ka base command.

ls -la

Hidden files aur detailed list dikhata hai.

Use: Full structure inspect karne ke liye.

ls -la

Permissions bhi nazar aati hain.

cd

Directory change karta hai.

Use: Folder ke andar move hone ke liye.

cd Downloads

Path galat likhne se error aata hai.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Ethical Hacking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Termux

Android terminal, packages, Linux workflow

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

  • pwd
  • ls
  • ls -la
  • cd
  • mkdir
Route / Termux

Termux

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: pwd

Ye lesson pwd ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum pwd ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

pwd

Task: Apni notebook me pwd ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

TermuxRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

ls -la

Task: Apni notebook me ls -la ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

TermuxRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Intro 4: cd

Ye lesson cd ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum cd ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

cd ~/storage/downloads

Task: Apni notebook me cd ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Commands / Tools

Termux command guide

pwd

Current folder ka path batata hai.

Use: Location confirm karne ke liye.

pwd

Har beginner ko pehle ye command samajhni chahiye.

ls

Folder ke andar files aur folders list karta hai.

Use: Content dekhne ke liye.

ls

Basic navigation ka base command.

ls -la

Hidden files aur detailed list dikhata hai.

Use: Full structure inspect karne ke liye.

ls -la

Permissions bhi nazar aati hain.

cd

Directory change karta hai.

Use: Folder ke andar move hone ke liye.

cd Downloads

Path galat likhne se error aata hai.

mkdir

Naya folder banata hai.

Use: Project folder create karne ke liye.

mkdir notes

Organizing ke liye useful.

touch

Nayi file create karta hai.

Use: Starter file banane ke liye.

touch notes.txt

Empty file instantly ban jati hai.

cp

File copy karta hai.

Use: Backup ke liye.

cp a.txt b.txt

Source aur destination check karo.

mv

File move ya rename karta hai.

Use: Folder organize karne ke liye.

mv old.txt new.txt

Rename bhi isi se hota hai.

rm

File delete karta hai.

Use: Sirf practice files ke liye.

rm temp.txt

Careful use karo, recover mushkil hota hai.

cat

File ki content screen par dikhata hai.

Use: Quick read ke liye.

cat notes.txt

Text file ke liye best.

grep

Text me specific word dhoondhta hai.

Use: Logs aur notes search karne ke liye.

grep 'error' log.txt

Filtering ka powerful tool.

find

Files ko naam ya pattern se search karta hai.

Use: Lost files locate karne ke liye.

find . -name '*.py'

Folder tree me search karta hai.

pkg update

Termux packages list update karta hai.

Use: Package database refresh karne ke liye.

pkg update

Install se pehle ye chalana behtar hai.

pkg upgrade

Installed packages ko update karta hai.

Use: System fresh rakhne ke liye.

pkg upgrade

Mobile terminal maintenance.

pkg install python

Python package install karta hai.

Use: Scripting shuru karne ke liye.

pkg install python

Termux me common step.

termux-setup-storage

Storage access deta hai.

Use: Downloads aur files use karne ke liye.

termux-setup-storage

Permission pehli dafa zaroori hoti hai.

git clone

Git repository copy karta hai.

Use: Project download karne ke liye.

git clone repo-url

Practice repos ke liye useful.

nano

Simple terminal editor kholta hai.

Use: Notes aur scripts edit karne ke liye.

nano notes.txt

Beginner ke liye friendly.

clear

Terminal screen clean karta hai.

Use: Output saaf dikhane ke liye.

clear

Visual cleanliness.

proot-distro

Linux distro manage karta hai.

Use: Termux me Linux environment ke liye.

proot-distro install ubuntu

Advanced mobile workflow.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Termux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.
Interactive Terminal

Real feel terminal simulator

Commands type karo, output screen par dekh kar practice karo.

Termux Learning Terminal

Linux

Shell, services, files, permissions

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Course Map

What you will learn

  • Filesystem
  • Shell
  • Users
  • Groups
  • Permissions
Route / Linux

Linux

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Filesystem

Ye lesson filesystem ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum filesystem ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

ls -la

Task: Apni notebook me filesystem ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

LinuxRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum shell ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

Task: Apni notebook me shell ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

Linux Full Course

001. Filesystem

Ye lesson filesystem ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is course me basics se start kar ke advance level tak jao ge. Har lesson me practical idea aur clear explanation diya gaya hai.

Is part me tum filesystem ka kaam, structure, aur use-case samjhoge. Isko notes me likho aur chhoti practice ke zariye yaad karo.

Commands / Tools

Linux command guide

ping

Host ki reachability check karta hai.

Use: Network test ke liye.

ping 8.8.8.8

Basic network check.

traceroute

Network path dikhata hai.

Use: Routing dekhne ke liye.

traceroute example.com

Troubleshooting me useful.

ss -tulpen

Listening ports dikhata hai.

Use: Services dekhne ke liye.

ss -tulpen

Admin level visibility.

systemctl status

Service ka status batata hai.

Use: Linux services inspect karne ke liye.

systemctl status ssh

Server aur desktop dono me helpful.

journalctl -xe

System logs ka detailed view deta hai.

Use: Errors troubleshoot karne ke liye.

journalctl -xe

Deep diagnostics.

chmod 755

File permissions change karta hai.

Use: Execute permission set karne ke liye.

chmod 755 script.sh

Permissions samajhna zaroori hai.

pwd

Current folder ka path batata hai.

Use: Location confirm karne ke liye.

pwd

Har beginner ko pehle ye command samajhni chahiye.

ls

Folder ke andar files aur folders list karta hai.

Use: Content dekhne ke liye.

ls

Basic navigation ka base command.

ls -la

Hidden files aur detailed list dikhata hai.

Use: Full structure inspect karne ke liye.

ls -la

Permissions bhi nazar aati hain.

cd

Directory change karta hai.

Use: Folder ke andar move hone ke liye.

cd Downloads

Path galat likhne se error aata hai.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Linux track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

HTML

Semantic structure and clean document layout

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Route / HTML

HTML

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Document structure

Ye lesson document structure ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum document structure ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

...

Task: Apni notebook me document structure ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

HTMLRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Roman Urdu HTML Practice
Commands / Tools

HTML command guide

body

Visible page content ka container.

Use: Jo user dekhta hai wo body me hota hai.

...

Main content yahan hota hai.

head

Metadata aur settings ka hissa.

Use: Title, CSS, SEO info ke liye.

...

Visible content nahi hota.

section

Related content ka block.

Use: Page ko logical parts me todne ke liye.

...

Structure clean karta hai.

article

Independent content block.

Use: Blog, lesson, ya card ke liye.

...

Reusable semantic container.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko HTML track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

CSS

Layout, styling, responsiveness, animation

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Route / CSS

structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation

practice + meaning

revision ready notes

Intro 1: Selectors

Ye lesson selectors ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum selectors ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

display: grid;

Task: Apni notebook me selectors ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

CSSRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Roman Urdu CSS Practice
Commands / Tools

CSS command guide

flexbox

One dimensional layout system.

Use: Row ya column align karne ke liye.

display: flex;

Buttons aur nav me common.

grid

Two dimensional layout system.

Use: Complex cards aur dashboard ke liye.

display: grid;

Modern layout base.

transition

Smooth change effect deta hai.

Use: Hover aur UI polish ke liye.

transition: .3s ease;

Animations ko soft banata hai.

media query

Screen size ke hisab se style change karta hai.

Use: Mobile responsive design ke liye.

@media (max-width: 768px)

Mobile first ka core.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko CSS track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

JavaScript

DOM, events, logic, interactivity

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Course Map

Overview Lessons Commands Glossary

What you will learn

  • Variables
  • Functions
  • Events
  • DOM
  • State
Route / JavaScript

JavaScript

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Variables

Ye lesson variables ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum variables ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

document.querySelector('.btn')

Task: Apni notebook me variables ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

JavaScriptRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

001. Variables

document.querySelector('.btn')

Roman Urdu JavaScript Practice
Commands / Tools

JavaScript command guide

querySelector

Element select karta hai.

Use: DOM ke kisi element ko pakarne ke liye.

document.querySelector('.btn')

UI manipulation ka base.

addEventListener

Event sunta hai.

Use: Click, input, submit events ke liye.

button.addEventListener('click')

Interactivity yahin se aati hai.

setTimeout

Delay ke baad kaam karta hai.

Use: Popup aur animation timing ke liye.

setTimeout(fn, 500)

Micro animation me useful.

localStorage

Browser me data save karta hai.

Use: Theme ya progress store karne ke liye.

localStorage.setItem()

User preferences ke liye useful.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko JavaScript track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Web Development

Frontend projects and deployment flow

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Course Map

Overview Lessons Commands Glossary

What you will learn

  • Project planning
  • Component design
  • Responsive layout
  • Accessibility
  • Performance
Route / Web Development

Web Development

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Project planning

Ye lesson project planning ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum project planning ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

plan project flow

Task: Apni notebook me project planning ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Web DevelopmentRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum responsive layout ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

review checklist

Task: Apni notebook me responsive layout ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Roman Urdu Web Development Practice
Commands / Tools

Web Development command guide

semantic tag

Main structure banane wala HTML tag.

Use: Clean documents ke liye.

,

Semantic HTML SEO aur accessibility me help karta hai.

selector

CSS me target choose karta hai.

Use: Styling ke liye.

.card, #menu

Class aur id selector ka difference samjho.

event listener

User action sunta hai.

Use: Button ya input interaction ke liye.

addEventListener('click')

JavaScript interactivity ka base.

fetch

Server se data lata hai.

Use: API calls ke liye.

fetch('/api')

Async data loading me kaam aata hai.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Web Development track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Scripting, automation, data handling

Intro 1: Syntax

Ye lesson syntax ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum syntax ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

print('Hello')

Task: Apni notebook me syntax ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Roman Urdu Python Practice
Commands / Tools

Python command guide

def

Function define karta hai.

Use: Reusable code likhne ke liye.

def main():

Python ka main building block.

for loop

Repeat karne ke liye use hota hai.

Use: Lists aur ranges ke liye.

for i in range(5):

Automation me useful.

with open

File safely open karta hai.

Use: Read/write operations ke liye.

with open('a.txt') as f:

Best practice for files.

list comprehension

Short style me list banata hai.

Use: Concise data processing ke liye.

[x for x in items]

Readable rakhna zaroori hai.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Python track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Route / Git & GitHub

Git & GitHub

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Repository

Ye lesson repository ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum repository ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

git init

Task: Apni notebook me repository ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Git & GitHubRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Intro 2: Commit

Ye lesson commit ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum commit ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

git add .

Task: Apni notebook me commit ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Git & GitHubRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Intro 3: Branch

Ye lesson branch ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum branch ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

git commit -m 'start'

Task: Apni notebook me branch ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Git & GitHubRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Intro 4: Merge

Ye lesson merge ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum merge ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

git branch -M main

Task: Apni notebook me merge ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Commands / Tools

Git & GitHub command guide

git init

Naya git repository shuru karta hai.

Use: Version control start karne ke liye.

git init

Project ko track karna shuru.

git add .

Changes staging me bhejta hai.

Use: Commit se pehle files select karne ke liye.

git add .

Commit workflow ka part.

git commit

Changes save karta hai.

Use: Snapshot banane ke liye.

git commit -m 'start'

Message clear rakho.

git push

Local changes remote par bhejta hai.

Use: GitHub pe upload ke liye.

git push origin main

Deploy workflow ka hissa.

git pull

Remote changes local me lata hai.

Use: Latest update lene ke liye.

git pull origin main

Sync rakhne ke liye.

git clone

Git repository copy karta hai.

Use: Project download karne ke liye.

git clone repo-url

Practice repos ke liye useful.

nano

Simple terminal editor kholta hai.

Use: Notes aur scripts edit karne ke liye.

nano notes.txt

Beginner ke liye friendly.

clear

Terminal screen clean karta hai.

Use: Output saaf dikhane ke liye.

clear

Visual cleanliness.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Git & GitHub track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Route / Networking

Networking

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: IP

Ye lesson ip ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum ip ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

ls -la

Task: Apni notebook me ip ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

NetworkingRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Roman Urdu Networking Practice
Commands / Tools

Networking command guide

ping

Host ki reachability check karta hai.

Use: Network test ke liye.

ping 8.8.8.8

Basic network check.

traceroute

Network path dikhata hai.

Use: Routing dekhne ke liye.

traceroute example.com

Troubleshooting me useful.

ss -tulpen

Listening ports dikhata hai.

Use: Services dekhne ke liye.

ss -tulpen

Admin level visibility.

systemctl status

Service ka status batata hai.

Use: Linux services inspect karne ke liye.

systemctl status ssh

Server aur desktop dono me helpful.

journalctl -xe

System logs ka detailed view deta hai.

Use: Errors troubleshoot karne ke liye.

journalctl -xe

Deep diagnostics.

chmod 755

File permissions change karta hai.

Use: Execute permission set karne ke liye.

chmod 755 script.sh

Permissions samajhna zaroori hai.

pwd

Current folder ka path batata hai.

Use: Location confirm karne ke liye.

pwd

Har beginner ko pehle ye command samajhni chahiye.

ls

Folder ke andar files aur folders list karta hai.

Use: Content dekhne ke liye.

ls

Basic navigation ka base command.

ls -la

Hidden files aur detailed list dikhata hai.

Use: Full structure inspect karne ke liye.

ls -la

Permissions bhi nazar aati hain.

cd

Directory change karta hai.

Use: Folder ke andar move hone ke liye.

cd Downloads

Path galat likhne se error aata hai.

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Networking track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Cloud Computing

Hosting, scaling, automation, operations

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Course Map

Overview Lessons Commands Glossary

What you will learn

  • Servers
  • Deployment
  • Containers
  • Scaling
  • Logging
Route / Cloud Computing

Cloud Computing

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Servers

Ye lesson servers ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum servers ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

plan project flow

Task: Apni notebook me servers ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Cloud ComputingRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Roman Urdu Cloud Computing Practice
Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Cloud Computing track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

UI / UX Design

Hierarchy, spacing, flow, accessibility

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Course Map

Overview Lessons Commands Glossary

What you will learn

  • Hierarchy
  • Spacing
  • Color
  • Typography
  • Accessibility
Route / UI / UX Design

UI / UX Design

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Hierarchy

Ye lesson hierarchy ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum hierarchy ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

plan project flow

Task: Apni notebook me hierarchy ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

UI / UX DesignRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Intro 4: Typography

Ye lesson typography ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum typography ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

refactor layout

Task: Apni notebook me typography ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

UI / UX DesignRoman UrduBeginner Friendly
