Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko UI / UX Design track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

SEO

Metadata, indexing, content structure

Ye course Roman Urdu me practical learning deta hai. Har lesson me concept, example, task aur PDF note shamil hai.

Route / SEO

SEO

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Metadata

Ye lesson metadata ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum metadata ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

plan project flow

Task: Apni notebook me metadata ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

SEORoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko SEO track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.

Route / Productivity Tools

Productivity Tools

Ye route alag page feel deta hai aur is me Roman Urdu course content diya gaya hai.

160 lessons
structured course content
Roman Urdu
step by step explanation
Commands
practice + meaning
PDF
revision ready notes

Intro 1: Notes

Ye lesson notes ko Roman Urdu me samjhata hai. Tum is module me basics se start kar ke practice tak jao ge. Har point simple language me explain kiya gaya hai taake beginner bhi follow kar sake.

Is lesson ka purpose ye hai ke tum notes ka real concept samajh sako. Phir is knowledge ko notes, practice aur project me apply kar sako. YASIR DEV ka maksad sirf batana nahi, sikhana hai.

plan project flow

Task: Apni notebook me notes ka short summary likho, phir 1 practice step karo. Agar command hai to safe environment me run karo. Roman Urdu me apna samjhaya hua note bhi save karo.

Safety: Sirf authorized aur legal practice environment me kaam karo. Agar cyber ya hacking related lesson ho to real systems par kabhi test na karo.

PDF: Is lesson ko PDF note ki tarah save kar sakte ho. Revision ke waqt ye print version kaam aayega.

Productivity ToolsRoman UrduBeginner Friendly

Roman Urdu Productivity Tools Practice
Glossary

Roman Urdu glossary

HTML

Markup language jo web page ka structure banati hai.

Example: HTML ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

CSS

Style language jo design aur layout control karti hai.

Example: CSS ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

JavaScript

Programming language jo interactivity deti hai.

Example: JavaScript ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DOM

Document Object Model jo page ki structure ko represent karta hai.

Example: DOM ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

API

Application programming interface jisse systems baat karte hain.

Example: API ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Termux

Android terminal environment jo Linux style commands support karta hai.

Example: Termux ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Linux

Open source operating system aur shell workflow.

Example: Linux ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Git

Version control tool jo code changes track karta hai.

Example: Git ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

GitHub

Code hosting platform jahan repositories share hoti hain.

Example: GitHub ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

SEO

Search engine optimization jo visibility improve karta hai.

Example: SEO ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UI

User interface, jo screen par nazar aata hai.

Example: UI ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

UX

User experience, jo use karte waqt mehsoos hota hai.

Example: UX ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Cloud

Remote servers aur services ka environment.

Example: Cloud ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Network

Devices aur systems ka connection.

Example: Network ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Permission

Kis user ko kya access hai.

Example: Permission ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Shell

Command line interface jahan commands likhi jati hain.

Example: Shell ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Package

Software bundle jo install hota hai.

Example: Package ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Repository

Code ka organized storage place.

Example: Repository ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Commit

Changes ka saved snapshot.

Example: Commit ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Branch

Git me alag development line.

Example: Branch ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

DNS

Domain name ko IP address me convert karta hai.

Example: DNS ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

IP

Internet Protocol address.

Example: IP ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Port

Network service ka logical doorway.

Example: Port ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Routing

Data ka path network me.

Example: Routing ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Latency

Network delay.

Example: Latency ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Accessibility

Har user ke liye website usable banana.

Example: Accessibility ko Productivity Tools track me samjhna asaan hota hai.

Is page par PDF export button use karke revision notes save kar sakte ho. Har lesson Roman Urdu me explain hai.
